articles.title: Japan's Sakura Internet jumps 20% as Microsoft plans $10 billion AI push with SoftBank - CNBC
articles.description: Microsoft said it plans to invest $10 billion in Japan between 2026 and 2029 to build AI infrastructure.

articles.title: Trump labor board orders Amazon to bargain with Teamsters - The Washington Post
articles.description: The decision reawakens a long-running dispute between a union that represents workers at a Staten Island warehouse and the tech giant following a milestone union victory in 2022.

articles.title: US: March Jobs Report Expected to Show a Bounce Back in Hiring - Forex Factory
articles.description: Economists forecast a rebound in hiring for the March employment report following a bleak showing in February, as the labor market continues to tread water. Analysts expect the March report to show 60,000 new jobs added, according to FactSet consensus estimat…

articles.title: Live Updates: As Iran war rages on and oil prices rise, Trump says U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left" - CBS News
articles.description: President Trump warned the U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran," and previewed that strikes on bridges and power plants could be next.

articles.title: Federal government sues three states over their regulation of prediction markets - AP News
articles.description: The federal government is suing Connecticut, Arizona and Illinois, challenging their efforts to regulate prediction market operators such as Kalshi and Polymarket. All three states have sent cease and desist orders to such companies accusing them of engaging …

articles.title: Blue Owl Reels as Investors Who Fueled Its Growth Now Want Out - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: The top-line numbers from Blue Owl Capital Inc.’s funds were unambiguous and, by just about any measure, ugly.

articles.title: Amazon hits sellers with ‘fuel surcharge’ as Iran war roils global energy markets - TechCrunch
articles.description: The e-commerce giant called the surcharge "temporary" but couldn't give a date for when the policy would be retired.

articles.title: United Airlines is raising bag fees by $10 beginning Friday - The Points Guy
articles.description: United Airlines will become the second U.S. airline to raise checked bag fees beginning Friday. The cost of a first bag on United will rise by $10.

articles.title: MIT study challenges AI job apocalypse narrative - Axios
articles.description: AI is advancing across the workforce more like a "rising tide" than a "crashing wave," the report finds.

articles.title: Tesla EV sales "underwhelming" as Elon Musk pivots to AI - Axios

articles.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Tesla, Globalstar, Blue Owl, United Airlines, Carnival, Lumentum, and More - Barron's
articles.description: Cruise line and airline stocks slide after President Donald Trump’s speech fails to assuage concerns over a drawn-out war in Iran.

articles.title: Wall Street Money Managers Hunker Down as Iran War Rages On - bloomberg.com
articles.description: Five weeks of war with Iran have wiped trillions off global stocks, pushed oil past $100 and kept it there and repriced wagers on interest rates and inflation.

articles.title: Claude Code leak used to push infostealer malware on GitHub - BleepingComputer
articles.description: Threat actors are exploiting the recent Claude Code source code leak by using fake GitHub repositories to deliver Vidar information-stealing malware.

articles.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show - TechCrunch
articles.description: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

articles.title: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer issues executive order to save Michigan drivers money amid rising gas prices - ClickOnDetroit | WDIV Local 4
articles.description: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer has signed an executive order that will help save Michigan drivers money at the gas pump by easing restrictions on fuel blends.

articles.title: A new weight-loss pill is here — and could rival Wegovy and Zepbound. Here's how it compares. - Business Insider
articles.description: The FDA has approved Foundayo, a new weight-loss pill that could give Eli Lilly an edge over other drugmakers. Here's how it compares to other GLP-1s.

articles.description: I won't go so far as to say car shows are back, but this one could definitely be a bit of an indication that the tides are turning
